name: computer-vision
description: Desktop computer vision and input control for Claude Code on Windows. 19 tools: screenshots, click, type, OCR with bounding boxes, natural language element finder (cv_find), text extraction (cv_get_text), UI accessibility trees. All input tools support background mode (background=True) — click, type, and send keys via PostMessage without moving the cursor or stealing focus, so the user can keep working undisturbed.
